checks.name: verifiers_classified
checks.description: All 9 Wave 5 verifiers (005-00 through 005-08) classified as structural-only

checks.name: behavioral_test_gate_established
checks.description: Integration verifier (FIX-13) provides behavioral testing for Wave 5 state machine lifecycle

rationale: Individual verifiers remain structural-only for component verification. Behavioral testing is provided by the integration verifier (TSK-P2-W5-FIX-13) which tests the full Wave 5 state machine lifecycle including trigger effects, state rule enforcement, and append-only guarantees. This separation of concerns allows component-level structural checks without complex FK chain setup in each verifier.
notes: Wave 5 behavioral testing is centralized in the integration verifier (FIX-13) to avoid FK chain complexity in individual component verifiers.
